Name: akiem
Passive Effect: Whenever You Order #, Foe Set Agony Order #
Flavor Text: The first to rise, the last to fall.

Name: dodan
Passive Effect: Your Cards with Equip cost -1. Whenever You Slot a Card, Deal 1d4 Hero
Flavor Text: The forge knows no master but fire.

Name: kael
Passive Effect: Your Spells Deal +2. Whenever Crush #, Set Agony Crush #
Flavor Text: Speed is a kind of honesty.

Name: belfius
Passive Effect: You may use Sorcery to pay for Entropy costs

Name: thala
Passive Effect: Whenever You Pray #, Your Hero Set Toughness Pray #

Name: rook
Passive Effect: Whenever Your Attack would be Denied, Deal 1 Hero
Flavor Text: The blade remembers, even when the hand forgets.

Name: mira
Flavor Text: Luck is preparation you cannot remember doing.
